ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- { "query" : attributes.queryParams.query, "user" : Mule::p('db.user'), "password": Mule::p('secure::db.password'), "url" : Mule::p('db.userurl') }
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- payload map ($.user_id as String)
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- payload map ($.job_role_id as String)

scatter-gather.doc:name: Scatter-Gather - Fetch User and Course Data

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- "SELECT u.id AS \"User ID\", u.first_name as \"Employee Name\", u.employee_id as \"Employee ID\", jr.name AS \"Current Job Role\", i.name AS \"CAT Industry Classification\" FROM public.\"user\" u JOIN public.job_role jr ON jr.id = u.job_role_id JOIN public.industry i ON i.id = jr.industry_id WHERE u.id IN (" ++ ((vars.user_id map ($ as String)) joinBy ",") ++ ") AND jr.id IN (" ++ ((vars.job_role_id map ($ as String)) joinBy ",") ++ ") AND u.deleted_at IS NULL"
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- { "query" : vars.glms_user_query, "user" : Mule::p('db.user'), "password": Mule::p('secure::db.password'), "url" : Mule::p('db.userurl') }

%dw 2.0 output application/java
var userIds = ((vars.user_id default []) map ($ as String)) joinBy "," var roleIds = ((vars.job_role_id default []) map ($ as String)) joinBy ","
--- "WITH base AS ( SELECT uc.user_id, uc.deleted_at, uc.reason, uc.curriculum_version_id, c.id AS curriculum_id, c.name AS curriculum_name, c.role_id, d.domain_name FROM glms_course.public.user_curriculum uc JOIN glms_course.public.curriculum_version cv ON cv.id = uc.curriculum_version_id AND cv.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN glms_course.public.curriculum c ON c.id = cv.curriculum_id AND c.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN glms_course.public.curriculum_domain cd ON cd.curriculum_id = c.id AND cd.deleted_at IS NULL JOIN glms_course.public.domains d ON d.id = cd.domain_id AND d.deleted_at IS NULL WHERE uc.user_id IN (" ++ userIds ++ ") AND c.role_id IN (" ++ roleIds ++ ") ),
program_type_cte AS ( SELECT user_id, role_id, CASE WHEN LOWER(domain_name) = 'service' THEN 'TCDP' WHEN LOWER(domain_name) = 'sales' THEN 'SCDP' ELSE domain_name END AS program_type FROM base WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ),
exclusion_cte AS ( SELECT user_id, role_id, TO_CHAR(deleted_at, 'Mon YY') AS exclusion_month_yy, CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM deleted_at) >= 4 THEN CONCAT( EXTRACT(YEAR FROM deleted_at)::int, '-', RIGHT((EXTRACT(YEAR FROM deleted_at)::int + 1)::text, 2) ) ELSE CONCAT( (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM deleted_at)::int - 1), '-', RIGHT(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM deleted_at)::text, 2) ) END AS financial_year, reason AS exclusion_reason FROM base WHERE deleted_at IS NOT NULL AND LOWER(domain_name) = 'service' ),
curriculum_name_cte AS ( SELECT user_id, role_id, curriculum_name FROM base WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ),
certification_cte AS ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (uc.user_id, uc.role_id) uc.user_id, uc.role_id, p.level_name, uc.completed_at AS last_acquired_certification_date FROM glms_course.public.user_certifications uc JOIN glms_course.public.proficiencies p ON p.id = uc.level_id WHERE uc.user_id IN (" ++ userIds ++ ") AND uc.role_id IN (" ++ roleIds ++ ") AND uc.status = 'completed' AND uc.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY uc.user_id, uc.role_id, uc.completed_at DESC )
SELECT b.user_id, b.role_id, pt.program_type, cn.curriculum_name, ex.exclusion_month_yy, ex.financial_year, ex.exclusion_reason, ce.level_name, ce.last_acquired_certification_date FROM base b LEFT JOIN program_type_cte pt ON pt.user_id = b.user_id AND pt.role_id = b.role_id LEFT JOIN curriculum_name_cte cn ON cn.user_id = b.user_id AND cn.role_id = b.role_id LEFT JOIN exclusion_cte ex ON ex.user_id = b.user_id AND ex.role_id = b.role_id LEFT JOIN certification_cte ce ON ce.user_id = b.user_id AND ce.role_id = b.role_id"
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- { "query" : vars.glms_course_query, "user" : Mule::p('db.user'), "password": Mule::p('secure::db.password'), "url" : Mule::p('db.courseurl') }

set-variable.doc:name: Aggregate User and Course Data
set-variable.value:
#[%dw 2.0 output application/json
var users = payload.'0'.payload default [] var tcdp = payload.'1'.payload default []
--- ((users ++ tcdp) groupBy ((item) -> (item."User ID" default item.user_id) as String)) pluck (items, key) -> items reduce ((item, acc = {}) -> acc ++ item)]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- vars.aggregatedData map { "Employee ID" : $."Employee ID" default "", "Employee Name" : $."Employee Name" default "", "Current Job Role" : $."Current Job Role" default "", "CAT Industry Classification" : $."CAT Industry Classification" default "", "TCDP Head Count" : $.program_type default "", "TCDP Exclusion Month / YY" : $.exclusion_month_yy default "", "FY of Exclusion" : $.financial_year default "", "Reason for TCDP Exclusion / Inclusion" : $.exclusion_reason default "", "ILP / Curricula Mapped" : $.curriculum_name default "", "Current TCDP Certification Level" : $.level_name default "", "Date of Certification (Last Aquired)" : $.last_acquired_certification_date default "" }
